itinerary.title: Bangkok Arrival & Transfer to Pattaya (Alcazar Show)
itinerary.description: Arrive in Bangkok. Transfer directly to the seaside resort city of Pattaya. In the evening, attend the dazzling and world-famous Alcazar Cabaret Show. (Note: Itinerary details are subject to change).

itinerary.title: Coral Island Speedboat Tour & Sri Racha Tiger Zoo
itinerary.description: Take a thrilling speedboat ride to Coral Island for water sports and relaxation on white sand beaches. Later, visit the Sri Racha Tiger Zoo to see exotic wildlife. (Note: Itinerary details are subject to change).

itinerary.title: Bangkok Safari World & Marine Park Day Trip
itinerary.description: Travel back to Bangkok for a full-day adventure at Safari World and Marine Park. Enjoy open safari drives and fascinating marine mammal shows. (Note: Itinerary details are subject to change).

itinerary.title: Bangkok Sightseeing & Departure
itinerary.description: Enjoy a morning of leisure or souvenir shopping in Bangkok before transferring to the airport for your departure flight. (Note: Itinerary details are subject to change).

title: Thailand: Bangkok & Pattaya Explorer
description: Discover the vibrant cities of Bangkok and Pattaya. Enjoy the gorgeous beaches and water activities at Coral Island, watch the spectacular Alcazar Show, visit the Sri Racha Tiger Zoo, and experience the thrill of Safari World and Marine Park.
highlights: Attend the world-famous Alcazar Cabaret Show in Pattaya
Take a speedboat trip to Coral Island for beach activities
Explore the Sri Racha Tiger Zoo
Enjoy a full day at Safari World and Marine Park in Bangkok
Please note: Itinerary details are subject to change
